title: Substrate (not for pots)
description:
Biomass is one of the few things that can be made very easily with Create or Mekanism, you will be making a lot of it to create the Mekanism Substrate pellets. The Pressurized Reaction Chamber is perfect for this and as a byproduct of this process you are making Ethene, a combustible gas, that can be used to generate power or recycle it back into making more substrate pellets.

Make the Pressurized Reaction Chamber and some Substrate.
